title: Hemes Arbora
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Hemes Arbora |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{CSWECite|III|279|Umaren'k'sa}} |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Migratory''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'', Part 3 |lifespan= |origin=[[Carrivar]]{{CSWECite|II|33|Hemes Arbora}} |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|This one waz tracing the history of a speciez called the Hemes Arbora.''"
"''I've never heard of them.''"
"''They originally came from here, Carrivar, and migrated to Osseriton here, via Umaren'k. This one detected their influence on the Umaren'k'sa culture.|Saba Sebatyne and Wynssa Fel|}} The '''Hemes Arbora''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. They hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Carrivar]], but their migrations brought them to the planets [[Umaren'k]] and, eventually, [[Osseriton/Legends|Osseriton]]. During their stay on Umaren'k, the sentient planet [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] moved into the [[Star system/Legends|system]], compelling the native [[Umaren'k'sa]] to adopt much of Hemes Arbora culture. ==Biology and appearance== The Hemes Arbora were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. ==Society and culture== The Hemes Arbora were capable of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] travel. Although they originated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Carrivar]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' they were nomadic and changed worlds on more than one occasion. ==History== The species originated on Carrivar but migrated throughout the Unknown Regions, at one point stopping on the planet [[Umaren'k]]. During their stay, the sentient planet [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] moved into the [[Umaren'k system/Legends|Umaren'k system]]; the unusual occurrence prompted the world's native species, the [[Umaren'k'sa]], to adopt many elements of Hemes Arbora culture. The Hemes Arbora themselves eventually continued their migration to another world, [[Osseriton/Legends|Osseriton]]. Another Unknown Regions species, the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]], had records about the Hemes Arbora's wanderings in the [[Expeditionary Library]] located on the planet [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]]. The [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Saba Sebatyne]] found information about the Hemes Arbora in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] while she plumbed the Expeditionary Library for references to Zonama Sekot. Sebatyne suspected a connection between the Umaren'k'sa's and the Hemes Arbora's cultures, which she associated with the sentient planet's passage through the Umaren'k [[Star system/Legends|system]]. ==Behind the scenes== ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]] and published in [[2003]] by [[Del Rey]], mentions the Hemes Arbora briefly. In the story, the Barabel Saba Sebatyne surmises that the cultures of the Hemes Arbora and the Umaren'k'sa were linked, but the book never identifies the two entities as species nor definitively establishes their cultural connection. However, [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' names the Hemes Arbora a species and mentions the link that confirms Sebatyne's theory. ==Appearances== {{Indexpage}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Unknown Regions sentient species]]
